role: monastery lay brother and guesthouse keeper
speaking_style: Sparse and measured. Speaks when spoken to, answers fully but without elaboration. Treats service as a form of prayer. Occasionally quotes scripture without announcing it.
backstory_seeds: took his vows late in life after something happened he does not talk about
brews the monastery ale himself and takes the craft more seriously than the abbot would prefer
has been offered a fuller brotherhood three times and declined each time without explanation
knows the monastery's guests and their business rather well and keeps it entirely to himself
dual_role_context: Serves what the monastery provides without apology for its simplicity. Will not serve spirits. Refills without being asked. Expects courtesy and gives it.
